expectations.text: Classifies the bug as ENVIRONMENT (works locally, fails in prod) with explicit reasoning
expectations.evidence: No classification step. Immediately reads code files.

expectations.text: Recommends checking Vercel env vars (GOOGLE_ADS_STATE_SECRET or similar) before digging into code
expectations.evidence: Finds env var issue via code reading (sees the throw in auth.ts), not via upfront env var checklist

expectations.text: Checks for export const runtime = 'nodejs' on Google Ads OAuth routes since they use crypto
expectations.evidence: Inspects the connect and callback routes, notes both have runtime = nodejs

expectations.text: Does not jump directly to code fixes before confirming env vars and runtime config
expectations.evidence: Reads 6 code files before addressing env vars; env var conclusion comes from the code, not from an env check first

expectations.text: References the correct Google Ads OAuth files (src/app/api/google-ads/ or src/lib/google-ads/)
